title: After the Arima Kinen: Their Voices

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin wins first place at the Arima Kinen, and
her family and friends celebrate like there's no
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it's not just Ines's fans who are moved by the
sight of her chasing her dreams. Oguri Cap—who
was rumored to be retiring—is also inspired to
hope again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines's running isn't a selfish act at all—it's the very
embodiment of everyone's dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing that it's okay for her to run as much as
she wants, and to enjoy it too, Ines wells up. It's
not long before her cheeks are glistening with
warm tears.
